description: Semantic attribute to PCA control mapping for haptic generation MVP.

attributes.name: energy_roughness
attributes.description: Stronger / rougher / more intense tactile feel.

attributes.name: temporal_irregularity
attributes.description: More irregular / jittery / less uniform timing structure.

attributes.name: modulation_texture
attributes.description: More modulated / textured / vibration-rich internal oscillation.

attributes.name: decay_envelope
attributes.description: Longer / more sustained / more lingering envelope.
